'''Mak Jorlen''' was an officer in the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Navy]]. He was the commander of the ''[[Thurse]]''. He knew [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
